description: Salesforce Connected Apps, OAuth tokens, session IDs, Apex/Flow red flags, and Lightning/Experience Cloud guest-user sharing patterns. Applies to Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, and Experience Cloud.

token_patterns.name: Salesforce Session ID
token_patterns.notes: 00D = Salesforce org-ID prefix. Session IDs are bearer credentials.

token_patterns.name: Salesforce Login URL with embedded session

misconfigurations.title: Experience Cloud guest user with sharing access to internal objects
misconfigurations.rationale: The 2021-2023 Salesforce 'Aura misconfiguration' incidents leaked PII via guest users that had org-wide-default read on Contacts, Cases, etc.
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Digital Experiences > All Sites > [Site] > Administration > Preferences — enable 'Secure guest user record access'. Re-audit object-level guest sharing.

misconfigurations.title: Non-admin profile granted `Modify All Data` or `View All Data`
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Profiles — remove these system permissions; use Permission Sets for the narrow use cases.

misconfigurations.title: API-only user without IP range / login-flow restriction
misconfigurations.rationale: API-only users with leaked passwords are silent ATO vectors.
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Profiles > Login IP Ranges, plus Connected App > Permitted Users = 'Admin approved users'.

misconfigurations.title: Connected App refresh-token policy set to 'Refresh token is valid until revoked'
misconfigurations.rationale: Indefinite refresh tokens convert any single token theft into permanent access.
misconfigurations.fix: Connected App > OAuth Policies > Refresh Token Policy = 'Expire after N days' or 'Revoke on logout'.

misconfigurations.title: MFA not enforced for direct UI logins
misconfigurations.rationale: Salesforce policy now mandates MFA; legacy orgs that haven't migrated are exposed.
misconfigurations.fix: Setup > Identity > Identity Verification > 'Require multi-factor authentication for all direct UI logins'.

misconfigurations.title: Apex class declared `without sharing` and exposed to external callers
misconfigurations.rationale: `without sharing` bypasses record-level security; external invocation = info leak.
misconfigurations.fix: Use `with sharing` by default; reserve `without sharing` for explicit elevated tasks called only by trusted internal flows.

admin_red_flags.title: Weekly/Monthly Data Export job scheduled by non-admin
admin_red_flags.rationale: Setup > Data Export is a tenant-wide dump.
admin_red_flags.signal: Setup Audit Trail: `Schedule Data Export` actor outside the IT admin group.

admin_red_flags.title: Report run that returns > 50k rows exported to CSV
admin_red_flags.rationale: Most legitimate reports run < 5k rows. Bulk CSV export is exfiltration shape.

admin_red_flags.title: Connected App installed/uninstalled by non-admin
admin_red_flags.signal: Setup Audit Trail: `Install Package` / `Uninstall Package` actor outside the IT admin group.

admin_red_flags.title: Permission Set granting `Modify All Data` assigned to a user
admin_red_flags.signal: Setup Audit Trail: `Permission set assignment changed` with target permset granting MAD/VAD.
